_meta.description: Allowlist of known-safe vendor private-tag CREATORS for CDR. Policy is DEFAULT-DENY: disarm keeps private tags whose creator is listed here and strips all others (unknown vendor, or smuggled payload). Even an allowlisted tag is stripped if its value carries an executable signature. An incomplete list only over-strips (safe) — it never keeps an unrecognized tag.
_meta.note: SEED — expand from real GE/Siemens/Philips/Canon/Hologic private dictionaries.

safe_creators: SIEMENS MED SP DXMG WH AWS 1
